task_completion.description: Create the Autopsy case with the correct name and case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the active case name 'Deleted_Evidence_2024' and case number 'INV-DEL-001' in the title bar, case details window, or new case wizard.

task_completion.description: Add the specified disk image as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing 'ntfs_undel.dd' listed under the 'Data Sources' tree in the left pane.

task_completion.description: Configure ingest modules to use only 'File Type Identification'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Run Ingest Modules' dialog showing ONLY the 'File Type Identification' checkbox selected, with all other modules unchecked.

task_completion.description: Locate and extract deleted files to the specified export directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing multiple files successfully extracted into the '/home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence/' directory, or the Autopsy 'Extract Files' dialog pointing to this directory.

task_completion.description: Generate a forensic report with the correct pipe-delimited format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence_report.txt'. The text must contain lines formatted as FILENAME|INODE_NUMBER|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH (e.g., file.txt|15|1024|N/A).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Autopsy GUI to analyze the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface (e.g., navigating the directory tree, viewing deleted files in the table), rather than relying solely on SleuthKit CLI tools (like fls or icat) in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify files were extracted via the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using Autopsy's 'Extract Files' feature (e.g., right-clicking deleted files and selecting Extract) rather than manually creating dummy files in the export directory.

integrity.description: Verify the report was generated based on actual findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent viewing file metadata (inode, size, hashes) within Autopsy and compiling the report in a text editor or via a script, rather than pasting a pre-computed list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The case name must be 'Deleted_Evidence_2024' with case number 'INV-DEL-001'. The disk image is located at '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The extracted files must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence/'. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence_report.txt' and formatted exactly as FILENAME|INODE_NUMBER|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH. The target image contains exactly 8 deleted files and 2 deleted directories.
